ad_creative_bodies: For over 100 years, PG&E has been fighting to keep San Francisco from having a publicly owned utility. But legally, San Francisco should already be providing public power to everyone! And if it does, your electricity bills could drop by up to 40%. I explain what I can do in Congress to make that happen. #sanfrancisco #news

I'm running for Congress to represent San Francisco, and I want to hear from you! Join me for a small group Zoom call and let's discuss how to fix our biggest problems.


The Democratic Party needs to change. Trump, MAGA, and the new authoritarianism won't go away on its own. We need a bold vision for how to raise living standards, quality of life and security for all Americans.


That's the type of leadership I've been promoting since 2016. After a career in San Francisco's tech industry, I helped lead Bernie Sanders' 2016 campaign and then launched a project to recruit and elect new leaders to Congress. One of them was Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC). I ran her 2018 campaign before going into Congress as her Chief of Staff, where I was in charge of writing and launching the Green New Deal.


I have seen what real leadership can do. I invite you to join me in this campaign—follow, like, and hit the button on the ad to sign up for one of my small group calls!


Thanks,
Saikat Chakrabarti

Wow — 11 months before the primary — and more than 500 people packed into our campaign HQ for our office opening party last night! We had to run the event twice to fit everyone in!


People are hungry for change, and they’re showing up to make it happen. The best part? We’re just getting started.


Couldn’t make it last night? Don’t worry — we’ll be holding events like this all over the city. And we’ll be running volunteer trainings every Saturday at our office. 


Just comment “volunteer” on this post, and we’ll get you plugged into the fight to bring real change to San Francisco and Congress!

ad_creative_bodies:
Why am I running for Congress? Because our city and our country are ready for change.


We need universal healthcare and universal childcare. We need affordable housing. We need to ban members of Congress from trading stocks. We need to put a wealth tax on multi-millionaires and billionaires, and we need to stop funding the genocide in Gaza.


To win, we’re going to have 100,000 conversations with voters across San Francisco. But we can’t do it alone! We need you. Sign up today on my website (link in bio) and help us build the largest canvassing team this city has ever seen.

I'm running against Nancy Pelosi because the Democratic Party needs to change. She believes Trump, MAGA, and the new authoritarianism will fade away on its own. I believe we need a totally new leadership in DC that not only knows how to fight Trump, but also how to deliver the change that Americans are demanding. We need a bold vision for how to raise living standards, quality of life and security for all Americans.


That's the type of leadership I've been promoting since 2016. After a career in San Francisco's tech industry, I helped lead Bernie Sanders' 2016 campaign and then launched a project to recruit and elect new leaders to Congress. One of them was Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC). I ran her 2018 campaign before going into Congress as her Chief of Staff, where I was in charge of writing and launching the Green New Deal.


I have seen what real leadership can do. I invite you to join me in this campaign—follow, like, and hit the button on the ad to contribute to this campaign what you can!


Thank you,
Saikat Chakrabarti

ad_creative_bodies:
I’m Saikat Chakrabarti, running for Congress to represent San Francisco. We have a goal to knock on every door in San Francisco and speak directly with hundreds of thousands of voters using every means available. 


This campaign believes in the power of the people over corporate interests. When we come together, we can win better transportation, more affordable housing, universal healthcare, and other changes that meaningfully improve real people’s lives. 


That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I hope you’ll join me as a volunteer on this campaign.
Thank you, Speaker Emerita Pelosi, for your decades of service that defined a generation of politics and for doing something truly rare in Washington: making room for the next one.

I’m Saikat Chakrabarti, running for Congress to represent San Francisco. We have a goal to knock on every door in San Francisco and speak directly with hundreds of thousands of voters using every means available. 


This campaign believes in the power of the people over corporate interests. When we come together, we can win better transportation, more affordable housing, universal healthcare, and other changes that meaningfully improve real people’s lives. 


That’s why I’m running for Congress, and why I hope you’ll join me as a volunteer on this campaign.

Join our amazing volunteers already out knocking doors across the city! We’ve been showing up every weekend — and now we’re hitting the doors every Wednesday too. Join the fun and sign up to volunteer with our team today!

Congrats Mayor Mamdani! 


Zohran proved it doesn’t matter how much money they throw at you. Organized people beat organized money if you stand for real change. 


I’m running for Congress to take on MAGA and make peoples lives better. That means we need people power! So far in San Francisco, 2000+ volunteers have knocked 40,000+ doors and over 7000 people have donated an average of $34 each, because our campaign is about bold change. 


Join us — chip in $1 or $3 today.

I’m Saikat Chakrabarti, and I’m working hard to earn your vote to represent you and every San Franciscan in Congress. Let me explain why: 


My dad came to this country with $8 in his pocket, and everything I’ve done since has been shaped by that chance at the American Dream. After a career in tech, I was Bernie's tech director in 2016, and helped launch the Green New Deal as AOC’s first chief of staff.


I’ve seen what’s possible when we fight for working people. I’m running because the establishment isn’t meeting the moment — but we can. We need a new generation of leaders and a bold vision to not just turn the page on MAGA authoritarianism, but build something better. Learn more at Saikat.us.

My dad came to this country with $8 in his pocket, and everything I’ve done since has been shaped by that chance at the American Dream. After a career in tech, I was Bernie's tech director in 2016, and helped launch the Green New Deal as AOC’s first chief of staff.


I’ve seen what’s possible when we fight for working people. I’m running because the establishment isn’t meeting the moment — but we can. We need a new generation of leaders and a bold vision to not just turn the page on MAGA authoritarianism, but build something better. 


Learn more and join our campaign at at Saikat.us.,My dad came to this country with $8 in his pocket, and everything I’ve done since has been shaped by that chance at the American Dream. 


My name is Saikat Chakrabarti, and I’m running for Congress to fight for working people and restore that promise for the next generation. Learn more about my campaign at Saikat.us.,I'm running for Congress because Democratic Party leaders have forgotten who they're supposed to fight for. We can fix this, but we've got to do it together. Learn more and get involved in my campaign at Saikat.us

I’m Saikat Chakrabarti, and I’m the only candidate running for San Francisco’s Congressional seat calling to:


✅ Overturn Citizens United
✅ Ban congressional stock trading
✅ Pass a wealth tax on the ultra-rich


I’m running to fight for working people and take on a system that serves corporate donors instead of us. 


If that's an agenda you can get behind, please chip in $1, $3, or $5 to my campaign today.

ad_creative_bodies:
Let’s be honest, 2026 has already been a lot for San Franciscans.


Instead of doomscrolling through it all, how about doing something that actually feels good and helps us build toward a better future? 


Saikat is hosting events to meet directly with voters throughout San Francisco, and he’d love to meet you! 


Join us at an event near you—no pressure, just conversation, community, and free pizza!,Feeling frustrated with politics? You’re not alone.


Saikat Chakrabarti is running to represent San Francisco in Congress—and he’s hitting neighborhoods across SF to meet directly with voters, share some pizza together, and talk about how we build a political system that actually works for working people. 


Come by, grab a bite, and help us shape the future of our city.,Change doesn’t start in Congress or Washington, it starts in your own neighborhood.


That’s why Saikat is hosting events across San Francisco to meet with voters face-to-face and give you the chance to ask real questions, raise concerns, and engage in thoughtful dialogue about the issues shaping our lives.  


We’d love to see you there!

This is a time for transformational change, and a plan to execute it. To fight the authoritarian coup and cost of living crisis, we must transform our broken system. 


That’s why I’m running to represent San Francisco in Congress, and why I’m asking for your support. 


Chip in $1, $5, or $15, sign up to volunteer, or get involved however you can to rebuild the Democratic party, and transform our nation.

I’m trying to meet everyone in San Francisco! That’s why we’re hosting events every week all over the city. 


Follow me to get updates on my campaign for Congress and the movement we’re building to shake up the Democratic establishment.

Our city deserves progress that doesn’t come at the expense of people’s health. Bayview-Hunters Point has waited long enough for justice. As your representative, I’ll make sure this radioactive site is fully cleaned up before any development moves forward.
I'd love to meet you this Saturday, 11AM, at Dolores Park in San Francisco! More info in the link below:

ad_creative_bodies:
If you’re like me, you believe that Democrats in DC have been folding when they should be fighting.  


We're facing an authoritarian takeover, and our party leadership acts like it's business as usual. That's not leadership—that's failure.


I'm not running to climb the ladder in a broken system. I'm running to shake its very foundation. I’m running to fight MAGA and corporate Democrats who won't deliver for working people.


San Francisco has always pushed this country forward when no one else would. It's time to push again. Sign up to join our campaign →
ad_creative_link_descriptions: I'm running for Congress because Democratic Party leaders in DC are unfit to lead in the world as it is today.

ad_creative_bodies:
Seven Democrats  joined Republicans to increase ICE funding with no guardrails — on the same day that ICE just detained a 5 year old child! And they did this with Speaker Jeffries’ blessing.


There is no excuse for this. We need new Democrats and new Democratic leadership that knows what to do in this moment because the current party has no clue.

I went from working in tech to helping Bernie Sanders modernize his presidential campaign and then helped launch the Green New Deal as AOC’s chief of staff. 


I’ve seen first-hand how DC’s broken system blocks progress — and how much impact one person can still make with real conviction. Now I’m running for Congress to fight for working people and bring real national-level experience to this race.


We need a new generation of leaders and a bold vision to not just turn the page on MAGA authoritarianism, but build something better. 


Learn more at Saikat.us

ad_creative_bodies:
I went from working in tech to helping Bernie Sanders modernize his presidential campaign and then helped launch the Green New Deal as AOC’s chief of staff. 


I’ve seen first-hand how DC’s broken system blocks progress — and how much impact one person can still make with real conviction. Now I’m running for Congress to fight for working people and bring real national-level experience to this race.


We need a new generation of leaders and a bold vision to not just turn the page on MAGA authoritarianism, but build something better. 


Learn more at Saikat.us

In San Francisco, our utility bills are at the mercy of PG&E. And guess what?


They’ve raised electric rates six times since 2024, money which went straight to wealthy shareholders. 


Instead of using that money to improve infrastructure or services, they let our grid literally catch fire. 


In Congress, I will use my position to finally enforce the Raker Act and oversee a deal that kicks out PG&E and ends their price gouging once and for all. 


Sign the petition to join me in fighting for public power in San Francisco →

ad_creative_bodies:
Did you know we have the chance to redefine the Democratic party this year? Nancy Pelosi is retiring, and who takes her seat in Congress matters. 


I’m Saikat Chakrabarti and I’m running for Congress because national Democratic leadership has absolutely failed to meet this moment. Whether it’s capitulating on ICE funding, government shutdowns, or failing to provide a compelling vision for how the Democratic party can lead us out of this mess, Sen. Schumer and Rep. Jeffies have proven they’re unfit to lead in the world as it is today.


2026 is a change election year, and I need your help. Please chip in $1 to send a signal that we need new leaders.

ad_creative_bodies: I'm Saikat Chakrabarti, a former housing affordability advisor and the author of the Green New Deal. I'm running for Congress because San Francisco needs leaders who won’t back down as we fight the cost of living crisis and take on the Trump administration.

Hasan asked me what the five issues that define my campaign are. Here they are:


1. Make the essentials affordable by having the government provide them
2. End political corruption
3. End the endless wars
4. Use AI to create the Star Trek future, not the Mad Max future
5. Create a mission for America to build a clean economy and prosperity for all​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​


Watch the full video for a bonus 6th top issue—and if this is an agenda you believe in, please chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign. Together, we can take on MAGA, the Democratic establishment, and build towards this vision.

ad_creative_bodies:
I’m Saikat Chakrabarti, I worked for Bernie and AOC, and I’m running for Congress in San Francisco to replace Nancy Pelosi and redefine the future of the Democratic Party.


Right now, we’re coming up on a big FEC fundraising deadline at the end of March. And in politics, these deadlines matter — because they show the political establishment how much real support a campaign has.


My opponents are backed by corporate donors and the same old political networks. But this campaign is different. We’re building a movement powered by regular people. 


That’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can afford— even one dollar — today. 


I know a dollar sounds small. But when thousands of people across the country give a dollar, it sends a powerful message: that people want a new generation of leadership in Congress: not establishment Democrats who have failed to meet this moment.


So if you believe it’s time for a new kind of leader to represent San Francisco and push the bounds of what’s possible, please pitch in $1 right now. Let’s show them what real people power really looks like.

I'll take on Donald Trump. I'll root out corruption and corporate money in politics. And I'll fight the cost of living crisis that's preventing middle-class families from affording housing and health care.

I’m Saikat Chakrabarti. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate cash, and I never will.


That means I’ll always be accountable to the people, not special interests.

I'm Saikat Chakrabarti. I'm running for Congress because we’re long overdue for a change in Democratic leadership. 


Working families deserve leaders who fight corruption and put people first — and I have the experience and the drive to deliver.
